regional_cost_note: Window installers in Invercargill typically charge $650–$1,600 per aluminium double-glazed window installed, and $16,000–$48,000+ to re-window a full house. Southland rates are typically 10–15% below the national average, though remote work may attract travel charges. All windows must comply with NZ Building Code H1 energy efficiency requirements — confirm your installer uses compliant products.
